activity_type: custom     — shows text on its own (what's on your mind)
streaming_url: Must be a Twitch or YouTube URL for Discord to show the purple LIVE badge.
bio: Bots cannot set their own bio through the API.
Set it manually: Discord Developer Portal → your app → General Information → Description.
commands: Discord automatically shows all slash commands in the bot's profile
under the 'Commands' tab — no extra setup needed.
